channel.title: governance on Christopher Burr - Personal Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in governance on Christopher Burr - Personal Portfolio

item.title: Automating Ethics
item.description: This is the first post in a series on the topic of automating ethical deliberation in data science and AI. The philosophy and ethics of technology has a long tradition. In tracing this history, we could go all the way back to the Ancient Greek philosophers and the concept technê. Alternatively, we could explore Martin Heidegger’s account of the relationship between technology and human existence (Dasein) as a starting point for modern phenomenological approaches to information and communication technologies.
